title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that AI and Bitcoin together enable individual sovereignty over labor, money, and time. He positions "bring your own agent" as the future of work and advocates for solopreneurs to build independent stacks combining sovereign money and machine leverage.
